title: Factsheets and FAQ - Veterinary Drugs - Canada.ca
content:
## Factsheets and FAQ - Veterinary Drugs
Listed by category, Health Canada's Veterinary Drugs Directorate has published Fact Sheets and Questions and Answers about the food safety, human and animal health and the regulation of veterinary drug products in Canada:
Who We Are and What We Do Animal Welfare and Health Canada's Veterinary Drugs Directorate
